name: MainChar
text: You just reminded me of an old friend of mine. We used to be really close when we were kids, but we lost touch long ago. I wonder how he's doing now.
Richard's face is unreadable, but you can sense a hint of sadness in his eyes. He seems to be lost in thought for a moment.

name: Richard
text: I'm sorry to hear that. I'm sure he's doing well wherever he is. Do you want to talk about him?

It's a bit awkward to talk about, but you decide to share a few memories of your childhood friend with Richard. You talk about the fun times you had together, the adventures you went on, and the bond you shared.
Hearing your stories, Richard's expression softens. Recalling his own childhood, he seems to be reminiscing about his past as well.

name: Richard
text: I'm glad you have such fond memories of your friend. It's important to hold onto those memories, even if you can't see each other anymore.
You nod in agreement, feeling a sense of comfort in Richard's words. It's nice to know that someone else understands the pain of losing touch with a close friend.

name: Richard
text: It's getting late, I plan to head back to my room soon. Do you want me to walk you back?

name: MainChar
text: That would be nice, thank you.
He smiles warmly at you, and accompanies you back to your room. As you walk, you can't help but feel a sense of connection with Richard.

name: Richard
text: Good night, [Player Name]. It was wonderful talking to you.
Thanking him, you head to your room and drift off to sleep.
You spend the next few days getting to know Richard better. Though closed off at first, he gradually opens up to you, sharing stories about his life and his family.

name: Butler
text: Pardon me, but I have a message for you. The last two participants have arrived. The game will begin this evening. Please be prepared.
You nod in response, feeling a mix of excitement and nervousness about the upcoming games. Richard looks unaffected by the news.

name: MainChar
text: It's finally beginning.
Richard only hums in response, but you can see a glint of excitement in his eyes. He seems to be looking forward to the games as well.
Soon you are all gathered in the main hall, waiting for the games to begin. Richard stands next to you, while Norton and the other participants are behind you.

name: Butler
text: The games will begin shortly. You are to find clues scattered around the manor, and solve puzzles to progress.

name: Butler
text: If you succeed, you will get what you seek. That is all I can say for now. Good luck to all of you.
The butler finishes his announcement, and you are left alone to begin searching. Norton is the first to leave, followed by the other participants.
Richard looks at you, and gives you a small nod before heading in the opposite direction. You are the last to leave, heading towards greenhouse.
You look around the greenhouse, searching for any clues. Beside the beehive, you find a small box.
'For promises made, and promises kept.' The box is locked, you look around for any hints on how to open it.
Footsteps can be heard approaching the greenhouse. You quickly hide the box and turn around to see Norton walking in.

name: Norton
text: What a surprise to see you here. Don't mind me, I'm just looking for clues like everyone else.
You nod in response, trying to act casual. Norton seems to be in a good mood, he might have found a clue that he's excited about.
The two of you search the greenhouse in silence, eventually after not finding anything, Norton leaves the greenhouse.
You watch Norton leave, and decide to continue your search. As you explore the greenhouse, you come across a hidden mechanism behind a potted plant.
You activate the mechanism, and a hidden entrance opens up, leading to a secret passageway. You cautiously enter the passageway, and find yourself in fountain room.

name: Richard
text: Hmm? [Player Name], what are you doing here?

name: MainChar
text: Richard! I didn't expect to see you here. I found a hidden passageway in the greenhouse, and it led me here.
Hearing your explanation, Richard's expression changes to one of surprise. He seems to be impressed by your discovery.

name: Richard
text: Impressive, [Player Name]. It seems we both have a knack for finding these hidden secrets.

name: MainChar
text: I was just lucky. I didn't expect to find anything like this.
He only smiles in response, looking down at the fountain. You spot something shiny at the bottom of the fountain, and you reach in to grab it. It's a small key.

name: Richard
text: A key? I wonder what it opens.
The key seems to fit the box you found in the greenhouse. You show it to Richard, and he nods in recognition.

name: Richard
text: I see, it seems you found the key to the box. Do you plan to open it?

name: MainChar
text: I was thinking of opening it, but I wanted to make sure it was the right key first.
You bring the key to the box, and it fits perfectly. You open the box, and inside you find a note with a few pictures.
Richard curiously looks at the note, and his expression changes to one of shock. The pictures on the note are of him, taken from a childhood long forgotten.

name: Richard
text: What... how could these photos be here?
You look at the photos, and recognize that they are of Richard as a child, playing in the garden with a friend. The friend in the photos looks just like you.

name: MainChar
text: These photos... they look like they were taken a long time ago. Do you recognize the person in the photos with you?
Richard looks at the photos for a moment, and then looks up at you with wide eyes. He seems to be trying to process the information.

name: Richard
text: It's you... my 'liege'.
The corners of your mouth twitch upwards at his words. As you tackle him in a hug.

name: MainChar
text: I finally found you! I thought I would never see you again!
His body stiffens for a moment, but then he relaxes and hugs you back, and you can feel the warmth of his embrace. It's a moment of genuine connection between the two of you.

name: Richard
text: That you did. We have a lot of catching up to do [Player Name].
